textByHash.42ea8b7d24eba16fb7d6c79a973ba49d65de724e: Hmm? What's that, young man? What can I do for you?
textByHash.436c5d58e2713af43b268a4638cad5846aebf71c: Hmm? What's that, young woman? What can I do for you?
textByHash.880f613febfec74d0e75179c2b3fc443fcd833e0: Hmm? What's that, young one? What can I do for you?
textByHash.b59929efcfa6f15655c847538577edd4f190f3fa: Hmm, well, mmm, do you have a family crest? I keep track of every Gielinor family, you know, so I might be able to find yours.
textByHash.25e73daf4d80d386c5f01b0f9de5b571a8befba3: I'm also something of an, mmm, a painter. If you've met any important persons or visited any nice places I could paint them for you.
textByHash.6a0f350b36006c93cce2ec120dc0cfedb763e3ad: First things first, young man! There is not much point in having a family crest if you cannot display it. You should train construction until you can build a wall decoration in your dining room.
textByHash.da4f32f37d224e7c577b1a018c9488aff4942786: First things first, young woman! There is not much point in having a family crest if you cannot display it. You should train construction until you can build a wall decoration in your dining room.
textByHash.8e755477e0dc80aa34b080b1062c3320eb4e8013: First things first, young one! There is not much point in having a family crest if you cannot display it. You should train construction until you can build a wall decoration in your dining room.
textByHash.42522e350220d1cf2112cf45ed676f57b2c50001: According to my records, your crest is .
textByHash.5fa8df7ffe772df0bbe53ec44dc68be962d9852a: Mmm, very well. Changing your crest will cost 5,000 coins.
textByHash.c87918b4ab184c7acff95d3c5294a1b400c52468: There are sixteen different symbols; which one would you like?
textByHash.dad7967f1f69b99ffebb181e73ab60a5d59091f0: But that legendary shield is still lost! I don't think it would be proper for you to wear its symbol.
textByHash.027c7dbaf4996bf8b1febf7ebcf956c947461e9e: Ah yes, the shield that you helped to retrieve. You have certainly earned the right to wear its symbol.
textByHash.e89533f96994c056a748d57662188d86010ec217: Ah, splendid, splendid. There is no better symbol than that of our fair land!
textByHash.b4655f869fe5204111f96a6dc971875683b756b3: Hmm, have you ever even met the Dorgeshuun? I don't think you should wear their symbol until you have made contact with that lost tribe.
textByHash.cd2e78fc6424b47179276b849c7cf2e48aabd2de: Ah yes, our new neighbours under Lumbridge. I hear you were the one who made contact with them, jolly good.
textByHash.8a2c96d17f16464ef2fcde588e4299db75b238e0: When the dragon on Crandor Isle remains undefeated? I think you should prove yourself a dragon-slayer before you can wear a dragon symbol!
textByHash.bebcd95c94b429417a7e54c0e0aca2ebc093d9bd: I see you are a mighty dragon-slayer! You have certainly earned the right to wear a dragon symbol.
textByHash.af93546eee5e1e09708f2bb62294cce5c33f88aa: A fairy? Fairies are rumoured to exist in a lost city somewhere. I don't think I should let you use them as a symbol until you have met them in person.
textByHash.e58d8569099faff07de8071d0265fd1dc34ebc70: Hmm, mmm, yes, everyone likes pretty fairies.
textByHash.f5c011eee835a15dfcfddad1468571a990fba77f: You do not seem to be very devoted to any god. I will not let you have a divine symbol unless you have level 70 prayer.
textByHash.4e3ca0fb46dbf1d5551ceb06ac9a10fd22f34810: Guthix, god of balance! I'm a Saradominist myself, you know, but we all find meaning in our way, what?
textByHash.3cbfcc116a428e260b1b3b9ee2ae5142cadc7c0e: Hmm, I'm not sure I like that HAM group, their beliefs are a little extreme for me. But if that's what you want.
textByHash.653ca6647f7e931b69f53c6f42740f8d5284008b: A horse? I know people talk about them, but I'm not at all sure they ever existed. I don't think I could let you use one as your symbol unless you can fetch me some kind of model of one.
textByHash.6800ae1fea39e6092b1502afcfd75a0598901b92: Ah, I see you've brought a toy horse for me to see. An interesting beast. Certainly you can use that as your crest if you like, although it seems a bit strange to me.
textByHash.2ca29c9232f40592486316b927ee9988a8f3a149: A Jungle Ogre, eh? Odd beast, very odd.
textByHash.02d3e96e2ac7f628d36826edf8b92f3a1c49b047: Our neighbours in the west? Very good, very good.
textByHash.0792a0ad0b7968de522e38d2f1c6796e777c3c85: Ah, the fair land of Lumbridge and Varrock.
textByHash.e5bc0082361260989cf928abf63f2e32a85e4dbb: You wish to represent yourself by a moneybag? I think to make that meaningful I should increase the price to 500,000 coins. Do you agree?
textByHash.30ca6104d478d90d1e7a1050fca7e60687ab2020: You wish to represent yourself by a money bag? I think to make that meaningful I should increase the price to 500,000 coins. Do you agree?
textByHash.f3bc7b45de1725689f7dc15d8aa990f5fd719969: Thank you very much! You may now use a money-bag as your symbol.
textByHash.0b62f99f686f5cc00777f0c95389551995b52a07: Well we can't have just any pauper using a money-bag as a symbol, can we? You'll have to choose a different symbol.
textByHash.63bb26e18b017d1798ea71658f59a5bec794272d: Ah, the great god Saradomin! May he smile on your house as you adorn it with his symbol!
textByHash.cc24dac949169b8f34a0330d283b5782f60aa0ae: A symbol of death? You do not seem like a killer to me; perhaps some other symbol would suit you better.
textByHash.834425bccad18447316b2115f1393e9543bab52d: Of... of course you can have a skull symbol, sir/madam!
textByHash.c755933bacdc38a900c4dfaf9aad91948ee56961: The god of Chaos? It is a terrible thing to worship that evil being. But if that is what you wish...
textByHash.3a8fe46d028617ee2fc4180dea049250d66e39ce: Would you like a portrait or an, mmm, a landscape? Or a map, maybe?
textByHash.2b3850f37fca12694252160919adeaf4bdefacc4: Mmm, well, there are a few portraits I can paint. I can only let you have one if you've got some connection with that person though. Who would you like?
textByHash.c7bb4479c1332390d35af6b09f05811920653043: That will be, mmm, 1000 coins please.
textByHash.7fa3ad6477fbf0405e2f5c3729d47f7be9c3e1ae: Well, mmm, maybe some other time, mmm?
textByHash.2765a5e269a499cc03731c2837e00059a4550715: Mmm, well, I can paint a few places. Where have you had your adventures?
textByHash.3255ec8749590a63732ae5406dab055491647823: That will be, mmm, 2000 coins please.
textByHash.98a9be1ab25dfb9cfe141bed39d1c45ec40a8c84: Mmm, yes, ah, I have painted maps of the known world on several different sizes of parchment. Which size would you like?
textByHash.57009204b88f8d2c5dc8d659981acd0c7432d1a1: Mmm, well, see you some other time maybe.
